deferrals.summary: Skill bodies still instruct agent-composed bare `jq` on the local tier (skills/review, review-and-fix, retrospective-weekly, implement phases, init) — on a shim-shadowed Windows host an agent-typed `jq` command hits the original defect the #247 resolver fixed for the .sh helpers.
deferrals.explanation: issue #247's Technical Context bounds the call-site migration to 'The jq call sites across scripts/*.sh and lib/*.sh' plus install.sh; agent-composed jq in SKILL.md bodies is the agent tier (allowlist-governed, runner-specific) — a distinct surface needing its own design (DEVFLOW_JQ is not exported to agent shells)
